paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.12, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the stock price has decreased by 31.77 percent.
There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with FinanzNachrichten.de reporting that Fermi Inc. has announced the date for its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, one of which discloses the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
